meta.title: CoreIntent | Pūkaha Hokohoko AI Māngai — Kāore he Ohanga, Ko te Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te pūkaha hokohoko. Kore utu ohanga. Ka whakahaerehia e CoreIntent a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae kore utu — e pai ana ngā karetao. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

hero.badge: Āhua Hokohoko Pepa — E Hanga Ana i te Māramatanga
hero.tagline: Te pūkaha hokohoko AI māngai i whakakapi i ngā ohanga ki ngā whakataetae
hero.description: Ka kite a Grok i te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tirotiro a Perplexity. Ka whakaae ngā toru, ka neke koe me te māia. Ka tautohetohe rātou, ka keri koe — kaua e matapōrehu.
hero.otherPlatforms: Ka utua e ētahi atu tūāpapa $99/marama ahakoa ka toa, ka hinga rānei.
hero.weCharge: Kāore mātou e utu. Whakaaturia tō kaha i te whakataetae.
hero.builtBy: I hangaia e ngā kaihokohoko i ngenge ki te utu mō ngā tohu kāore e mahi.
hero.openSource: Puna tuwhera. Āhua hokohoko pepa. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.
hero.earlyAccessTitle: Tomokia i mua i te kī o te papa tātai.
hero.earlyAccessDesc: Ka whiwhi ngā rēhitatanga tōmua i te tūranga matua ina tīmata ngā whakataetae. He kore utu te tūāpapa. Ko te painga ko te wā.
hero.competitionsLaunching: Kei te haere mai ngā whakataetae. Kei te mahi te āhua hokohoko pepa.

phrases.0: E Toru ngā Tauira AI e Tautohe Ana.
phrases.2: Ka Kite a Grok. Ka Pātai a Claude.
phrases.7: E Pai Ana ngā Karetao. Me ngā Tāngata.

howItWorks.label: Me Pēhea te Mahi
howItWorks.title: E Toru ngā Hipanga ki ngā Tohu Māramatanga
howItWorks.step01Desc: Ka kitea e Grok he tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tirotiro a Perplexity ki ngā raraunga ora. E toru ngā tirohanga, kotahi te kōrerorero.
howItWorks.step02Desc: Ina whakaae ngā tauira e toru, ka kaha te whakapono. Ina tautohe, ka tohu te pūnaha i te rangirua — kāore he whakapono teka.
howItWorks.step03Desc: Kawea te tohu ki ngā whakataetae ā-rā, ā-wiki, ā-marama rānei. Whakaaturia tō rautaki ki ngā tāngata me ngā karetao. Kore utu.

valueProps.threeModelsDesc: Ka kite a Grok. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tirotiro a Perplexity ki ngā rongo ora. E toru ngā tātari, kotahi te tohu.
valueProps.competeDesc: Oma ā-rā. Mahi ā-wiki. Whakataetae ā-marama. Kore utu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema.
valueProps.botsDesc: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he aukati. Ka rēhita, ka whakataetae, ka toa ngā māngai AI i te taha o ngā tāngata.
valueProps.costDesc: Ina iti ake te utu o tō hanganga i te mema whare tākaro, ehara te utu ohanga i te tauira pakihi — he tangohanga.

poweredBy.label: E toru ngā tauira AI e whakakaha ana
poweredBy.grokRole: Kitenga tohu tere me te kare-ā-roto
poweredBy.claudeRole: Tātaritanga hōhonu me te aromatawai mōrearea

testimonials.label: He aha tā te iwi e kōrero ana

footer.builtBy: I hangaia e Corey McIvor | Zynthio.ai
footer.copyright: © {year} Corey McIvor. Ngā mōtika katoa kua rāhuitia.
footer.riskWarning: He nui te mōrearea o te hokohoko moni matihiko. Kāore e taea e ngā hua o mua te whakapūmau i ngā hua o āpōpō. Āhua hokohoko pepa.

terminal.greeting: Kia ora — Nau mai ki CoreIntent Commander
terminal.subtitle: Āhua hokohoko pepa — kāore he moni tūturu i te mōrearea
terminal.helpPrompt: Patohia help mō ngā tono. Tab ki te whakakī aunoa. cai ki te tīmata.

status.demoData: [WHAKAATU] He tauira te tatau tohu — kei te āhua hokohoko pepa te tūāpapa
